tables.query:
select 
    date_trunc(sales_date, month) as calend_month
    , region_name
    , country_name
    , is_key_country
    , sum(regular_price_usd) as regular_price_usd
    , sum(discounted_price_usd) as discounted_price_usd
from `my-project-19032025.marts.sales_enriched`
group by all

with locations as (
    select *
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_locations`
)
, join_cities as (
    select 
        locations.*
        , c.city_name
        , c.country_id
    from locations
    left join `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_cities` as c using (city_id)
)
, join_countries as (
    select 
        join_cities.*
        , c.country_code
        , c.country_name
        , c.region_code
    from join_cities
    left join `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_countries_latest` as c using (country_id)
)
, join_regions as (
    select 
        join_countries.*
        , r.region_name
    from join_countries
    left join `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_regions_latest` as r using (region_code)
)
select *
from join_regions

select 
    *
    , 
    CASE 
        WHEN country_code IN ('DE', 'BY', 'UK') 
        THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 END AS is_key_country
           
from `my-project-19032025.marts.geo_locations`

with sales as (
    select *
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_sales`
)
, join_prices_and_discounts as (
    select
        sales.*
        , p.regular_price_usd
        , d.discount
        , p.regular_price_usd * (1 - d.discount) as discounted_price_usd
    from sales
    left join `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_prices` as p on sales.sku_id = p.sku_id and sales.sales_date between p._row_valid_from and p._row_valid_to
    left join `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_discounts` as d on sales.sku_id = d.sku_id and sales.sales_date between d._row_valid_from and d._row_valid_to
)
, join_sku as (
    select 
        a.*
        , s.sku_name
        , s.sku_category
        , s.sku_price_segment
    from join_prices_and_discounts as a
    left join `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_sku` as s using (sku_id)
)
, join_locations as (
    select
        a.*
        , g.city_name
        , g.country_name
        , g.region_name
        , g.is_key_country
    from join_sku as a
    left join `my-project-19032025.marts.geo_locations_enriched` as g using (location_id)
)
select *
from join_locations

with raw_data as (
    select *
    from `my-project-19032025.raw.countries`
)
, add_scd as (
    
        select
            *,
            changed_at as _row_valid_from,
            coalesce(lead(changed_at) over (partition by country_id order by changed_at), date('4999-12-31')) as _row_valid_to,
            case when lead(changed_at) over (partition by country_id order by changed_at) is null then 1 else 0 end as _is_active
        from raw_data  
  
)
select *
from add_scd

with raw_data as (
    select *
    from `my-project-19032025.raw.discounts`
)
, add_scd as (
    
        select
            *,
            changed_at as _row_valid_from,
            coalesce(lead(changed_at) over (partition by sku_id order by changed_at), date('4999-12-31')) as _row_valid_to,
            case when lead(changed_at) over (partition by sku_id order by changed_at) is null then 1 else 0 end as _is_active
        from raw_data  
  
)
select * 
from add_scd

select 
    *
    , concat(first_name, " ", last_name) as full_name
from `my-project-19032025.raw.employees`

with raw_data as (
    select *
    from `my-project-19032025.raw.prices`
)
, add_scd as (
    
        select
            *,
            changed_at as _row_valid_from,
            coalesce(lead(changed_at) over (partition by sku_id order by changed_at), date('4999-12-31')) as _row_valid_to,
            case when lead(changed_at) over (partition by sku_id order by changed_at) is null then 1 else 0 end as _is_active
        from raw_data  
  
)
select *
from add_scd

with raw_data as (
    select *
    from `my-project-19032025.raw.regions`
)
, add_scd as (
    
        select
            *,
            changed_at as _row_valid_from,
            coalesce(lead(changed_at) over (partition by region_code order by changed_at), date('4999-12-31')) as _row_valid_to,
            case when lead(changed_at) over (partition by region_code order by changed_at) is null then 1 else 0 end as _is_active
        from raw_data  
  
)
select *
from add_scd

assertions.query:
select
    country_id as invalid_key
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_cities`
    where country_id not in (
      select country_id from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_countries`
    )

select
    region_code as invalid_key
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_countries`
    where region_code not in (
      select region_code from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_regions`
    )

select
    sku_id as invalid_key
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_discounts`
    where sku_id not in (
      select sku_id from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_sku`
    )

select
    city_id as invalid_key
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_locations`
    where city_id not in (
      select city_id from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_cities`
    )

select
    sku_id as invalid_key
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_prices`
    where sku_id not in (
      select sku_id from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_sku`
    )

select
    sales_repr_id as invalid_key
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_sales`
    where sales_repr_id not in (
      select sales_repr_id from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_employees`
    )

select
    location_id as invalid_key
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_sales`
    where location_id not in (
      select location_id from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_locations`
    )

select
    sku_id as invalid_key
    from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_sales`
    where sku_id not in (
      select sku_id from `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_sku`
    )

SELECT
  *
FROM (
  SELECT
    city_id,
    COUNT(1) AS index_row_count
  FROM `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_cities`
  GROUP BY city_id
  ) AS data
WHERE index_row_count > 1

SELECT
  'city_id IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_cities`
WHERE NOT (city_id IS NOT NULL)
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'country_id IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `my-project-19032025.staging.stg_cities`
WHERE NOT (country_id IS NOT NULL)

  ) AS data
WHERE index_row_count > 1
